---
title: "Revealjs Slides"
author: "Nakul R. Padalkar"
format: html
---

Query Garden includes a standalone revealjs deck for checking presentation
layouts and `output-location` behavior.

Open the rendered deck here:
[Query Garden Revealjs Example](query-garden-revealjs.html).

The slide source is kept in `examples/query-garden-revealjs.qmd`, separate from
the book chapters, because it renders with `format: revealjs`.

## Covered Layouts

- `below`
- `column`
- `fragment`
- `slide`
